title: Florin Neagu Projects & Notes
description: Technical notes, projects, articles, and code references

items.title: Overview
items.content_html: Personal projects and case studies — home lab builds, Azure automation pipelines, and enterprise SASE and AI engagements, with real architecture and outcomes.

items.title: NICU AI Strategy Workshop
items.content_html: A two-day AI strategy workshop for an Australian credit union that turned three unanswered leadership questions — automate or generate, what's our AI philosophy, and how do we govern AI staff are already using without permission — into a signed-off philosophy and a board-ready roadmap.

items.title: NICU IRRBB Proof of Concept
items.content_html: Inside the machine learning pipeline that replaces three static IRRBB behavioural assumptions with trained, explainable models — architecture, an honest governance mapping against APRA's model risk requirements, and why this had to be predictive ML rather than an LLM.

items.title: Prisma Access SASE Implementation
items.content_html: Replacing two disconnected legacy security platforms with a single identity-aware Prisma Access SASE deployment across 30 branch sites, four data centres, and 5,000 managed endpoints.

items.title: Infrastructure Consolidation
items.content_html: Collapsed a six-server Windows homelab into three through DC virtualization, SCCM stack consolidation, and structured server decommission — completed in ten days.

items.title: Transcript Action Extractor
items.content_html: A lightweight Python tool that skips the meeting summary and goes straight to structured, owner-attributed action items in JSON.

items.title: Meeting Audio Notes Pipeline
items.content_html: A three-stage Python pipeline that transcribes meeting recordings and outputs a Markdown notes file with a summary, key decisions, and action items.

items.title: Invoice Processor
items.content_html: Batch-extract invoice data to CSV using Azure Document Intelligence and Blob Storage — no templates, no per-vendor config.

items.title: Overview
items.content_html: Technical write-ups, setup guides, and feature references — organised by topic cluster.

items.title: Code & Data
items.content_html: Reusable code snippets and data utilities — Python functions, statistical tools, and reference implementations.

items.title: MkDocs & Material
items.content_html: Setup guides and feature references for MkDocs with the Material theme.

items.title: Overview
items.content_html: A full-stack workout tracker built with Claude Code in ~22 prompt sessions — and what it reveals about the relationship between AI tooling and architecture knowledge.

items.title: M365 Tenant Separation
items.content_html: How a legal business separation turned into a five-week forced cutover across Microsoft 365, Windows devices, and Azure ERP infrastructure — delivered automation-first with no pilot run.

items.title: Architecture as Input
items.content_html: Why architecture knowledge is the key ingredient in AI-assisted development — and how the /docs folder pattern kept Claude Code consistent across 22 prompt sessions.

items.title: Building with Claude Code
items.content_html: How Claude Code was used throughout the build: prompt modes, CLAUDE.md, custom slash commands, MCP integration, GitHub Actions workflows, and context window discipline.

items.title: Prompt Log
items.content_html: Annotated walkthrough of all 12 build phases — the prompts that drove each phase and why each approach was chosen.

items.title: The Application
items.content_html: What was built: a full-stack workout tracker with authentication, a relational database, server-side rendering, and Vercel deployment.

items.title: Paperless-ngx
items.content_html: Practical guide to deploying Paperless-ngx on a Synology NAS with Docker, OCR, multi-user access, and automated document classification.

items.title: Obsidian Integration
items.content_html: How to use Obsidian as a writing front-end for an MkDocs site, with Git version control.

items.title: MkDocs Setup
items.content_html: Step-by-step guide to setting up MkDocs with the Material theme on Windows, with GitHub Pages deployment.
